calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Cindy Lee, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Anthony Belmonte, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Scott Herber.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 2, 2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Yerba Buena Commons - Residential Tenancy
Agreement dated 11/01/04-------------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---3-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 12/10/08--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Proof of Service of the 3-Day Notice
to Pay Rent or Quit dated 12/10/08---------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Anthony Belmonte, and against defendant Scott Herber as follows:

Past-due Rent - $1,420.00.
Holdover Damages - $473.20.
Costs - $430.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,223.20.

Additionally, plaintiff Anthony Belmonte is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 88 Perry Street, Unit #647, San Francisco, CA 94107. The rental agreement is canceled and the lease agreement is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Off Calendar
